recommendations.title: Saaho
recommendations.overview: A battle for power ensues as warring gangters thrive to gain possession of a "black box" that can make them richer than they already are, and an undercover cop intervenes with the help of his sharp intellect and an instinct to kill.

recommendations.title: G-Force
recommendations.overview: A team of trained secret agent animals, guinea pigs Darwin, Hurley, Juarez, Blaster, mole Speckles, and fly Mooch takes on a mission for the US government to stop evil Leonard Saber, who plans to destroy the world with household appliances. But the g

recommendations.title: The Hoarder
recommendations.overview: Ella discovers a terrifying secret when she becomes trapped in an underground storage facility. To survive she must join forces with a group of strangers, each with something to hide.

recommendations.title: Hitman: Agent 47
recommendations.overview: An assassin teams up with a woman to help her find her father and uncover the mysteries of her ancestry.

recommendations.title: Hidden Agenda
recommendations.overview: In Ireland, American lawyer Ingrid Jessner and her activist partner, Paul Sullivan, struggle to uncover atrocities committed by the British government against the Northern Irish during the "Troubles." But when Sullivan is assassinated in the streets,

recommendations.title: Patema Inverted
recommendations.overview: A young girl, from a civilization that resides in deep underground tunnels, finds herself trapped in an inverted world and teams up with a resident to escape and return home.

recommendations.title: The Kingdom
recommendations.overview: A team of U.S. government agents is sent to investigate the bombing of an American facility in the Middle East.

recommendations.title: Sayen: The Huntress
recommendations.overview: Realizing that she cannot take down Fisk alone, Sayen teams up with an underground resistance group with a plan to expose and end Fisk's unchecked plundering once and for all.

recommendations.title: Nimona
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Action, Drama, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A knight framed for a tragic crime teams with a scrappy, shape-shifting teen to prove his innocence.
